programme.desc: Two best friends, Mangal and Deep, embark on a journey to the big city to fulfil their musical dreams. In his quest to see Deep succeed, Mangal risks everything, including his own finances.

programme.desc: When a tea estate owner's son falls in love with one of the labourers, he tries to separate them but his son dies. Years later, the owner's grandson Bikram returns, unaware of his family roots.

programme.title: Hangsaraj
programme.desc: A Baul singer with big dreams, Hansa, moves to Kolkata to pursue his dream of singing on national radio. However, he faces numerous challenges, testing his resolve and passion for music.

programme.title: Switzerland
programme.desc: Shibu and Rumi lead a middle-class family life with their children and can only afford to go to local destinations for holidays. One day, they decide to save money for a trip to Switzerland.

programme.title: Lockdown
programme.desc: During a nationwide lockdown, the lives of six strangers intersect as they each deal with their own worries during a raging pandemic.

programme.title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
programme.desc: S1 , E496 : Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

programme.desc: Follow the life of Moosa, a fisherman who lives with his wife and two children and faces a lot of exciting and comedic paradoxes in his day-to-day life with family & work.

programme.title: Sur
programme.desc: A renowned singer teaches a promising young student, but becomes jealous when her talent and fame eclipses his own.

programme.title: Hungama
programme.desc: A millionaire businessman living in a village decides to move to the city with his wife. However, things take a comical turn as a case of mistaken identity causes chaos in their lives.

programme.title: Hungama 2
programme.desc: Vani, Aakash's former lover, returns to him and reveals that he is the father of her child. However, things go awry when he rejects her claim and seeks help from his colleague Anjali.

programme.title: Heyy Babyy
programme.desc: Three handsome Sydney bachelors Aroush, Tanmay and Al - are having the time of their lives in Sydney. They flirt around, sleep around and have numerous 'gorgeous' conquests to their credit.

programme.title: Stree2 - Sarkate Ka Aatank
programme.desc: In the town of Chanderi, a headless spirit begins to abduct women. Vicky and his friends unite to resolve the mystery and save everyone from the threat.

programme.title: Tamasha
programme.desc: While on a vacation in Corsica, Ved and Tara fall in love and decide to hide their true identities. After the trip, Tara goes to Delhi to find a Ved who is struggling with his true self.

programme.title: Khatta Meetha
programme.desc: A seemingly corrupt petty contractor faces challenges from the local municipality, his family, his employees, as well as a former girlfriend and her family.

programme.title: Dil Bechara
programme.desc: While struggling to survive, Manny and Kizie, who each have a terminal illness, fall in love with each other. Thereafter, the two try to spend the rest of their days being happy and staying positive.

programme.title: Simmba
programme.desc: Inspector Simmba is a corrupt officer who works for a major smuggler. He finds his values challenged as the gangster's brothers assault his sworn sister.

programme.title: Teri Baaton Mein Aisa Uljha Jiya
programme.desc: A robotics engineer on the quest to find his ideal partner, falls in love with an intelligent female robot mistaking her for a real woman in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Pippa
programme.desc: Balram Singh Mehta of the 45th Cavalry tank squadron steps up to prove his worth by fighting on the eastern front during the Indo-Pakistani war of 1971.
